import axios from"axios";const apiURL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL;export const getUserById=async uId=>{try{let res=await axios.post("".concat(apiURL,"/api/user/single-user"),{uId});return res.data;}catch(error){console.log(error);}};export const getUserByHospitalId=async hospitalId=>{try{let res=await axios.post("".concat(apiURL,"/api/user/user-by-hospitalid"),{hospitalId});return res.data;}catch(error){console.log(error);}};export const updatePersonalInformationFetch=async userData=>{try{let res=await axios.post("".concat(apiURL,"/api/user/edit-user"),userData);return res.data;}catch(error){console.log(error);}};export const getOrderByUser=async uId=>{try{let res=await axios.post("".concat(apiURL,"/api/order/order-by-user"),{uId});return res.data;}catch(error){console.log(error);}};export const updatePassword=async formData=>{try{let res=await axios.post("".concat(apiURL,"/api/user/change-password"),formData);return res.data;}catch(error){console.log(error);}};export const sendOtp=async data=>{try{let res=await axios.post("".concat(apiURL,"/api/user/send-otp"),data);return res.data;}catch(error){console.log("sendOtp error",error);// Normalize error so caller can show useful message
if(error.response&&error.response.data)return error.response.data;return{error:error.message||"Network error"};}};export const verifyOtp=async data=>{try{let res=await axios.post("".concat(apiURL,"/api/user/verify-otp"),data);return res.data;}catch(error){console.log("verifyOtp error",error);if(error.response&&error.response.data)return error.response.data;return{error:error.message||"Network error"};}};
